page_title: Privacy Policy — AI Business Studio London
heading: Privacy Policy
body:
AI Business Studio London is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard the information you provide when using our website or requesting an invitation.

### 1. Information We Collect

When you submit a request for an invitation through our form, we collect your name, business email address, organization name, and details regarding your business context. We collect this information solely to evaluate potential partnerships.

### 2. How We Use Your Information

We use the collected data to personally review and respond to your enquiry. We do not sell, distribute, or lease your personal information to third parties unless we have your explicit permission or are required by law to do so.

### 3. Data Security and Hosting

Your form submissions are transmitted securely and processed in compliance with applicable data protection laws. We maintain appropriate physical, technological, and administrative procedures to safeguard and secure the information we collect online.

### 4. Contact Us

If you have any questions regarding this privacy policy or our data practices, please contact us directly at info@aibusinessstudio.london.
